entities.name: NCT02692716
entities.context: PIONEER 6 (NCT02692716): A global Phase 3 interventional trial investigating cardiovascular safety of oral semaglutide in type 2 diabetes

attributes.descriptive_title: A Trial Investigating the Cardiovascular Safety of Oral Semaglutide in Subjects With Type 2 Diabetes

entities.name: Phase 3
entities.context: Phase: PHASE3 as listed in the trial record

entities.name: semaglutide
entities.context: Semaglutide, a GLP-1 receptor agonist formulated for oral use once daily, evaluated in PIONEER 6

entities.name: Oral semaglutide (experimental arm)
entities.context: Experimental arm: oral semaglutide administered once daily

entities.name: Placebo (oral, once daily)
entities.context: Placebo comparator arm: placebo for oral use once daily

entities.name: Arm: Oral semaglutide
entities.context: Experimental arm: oral semaglutide once daily; part of NCT02692716

entities.name: Arm: Placebo
entities.context: Placebo comparator arm: placebo oral once daily; part of NCT02692716

entities.name: Diabetes Mellitus, Type 2
entities.context: Subjects with type 2 diabetes enrolled in cardiovascular outcomes trial

entities.name: major adverse cardiovascular events (MACE)
entities.context: Primary endpoint: time from randomisation to first occurrence of MACE composite (cardiovascular death, non-fatal MI, or non-fatal stroke)

attributes.components: Cardiovascular death, non-fatal myocardial infarction, non-fatal stroke

entities.name: expanded composite cardiovascular endpoint
entities.context: Secondary endpoint: time to first occurrence of expanded composite CV endpoint (CV death, non-fatal MI, non-fatal stroke, UAP requiring hospitalisation, or hospitalisation for heart failure)

attributes.components: CV death, non-fatal MI, non-fatal stroke, UAP requiring hospitalisation, hospitalisation for heart failure

entities.name: all-cause death, non-fatal MI, or non-fatal stroke composite
entities.context: Secondary endpoint: time to first occurrence of composite of all-cause death, non-fatal MI, or non-fatal stroke

entities.name: fatal or non-fatal myocardial infarction
entities.context: Secondary endpoint: time to first occurrence of fatal or non-fatal myocardial infarction

entities.name: fatal or non-fatal stroke
entities.context: Secondary endpoint: time to first occurrence of fatal or non-fatal stroke

entities.name: all-cause death
entities.context: Secondary endpoint: time from randomisation to all-cause death

entities.name: Adults with type 2 diabetes and cardiovascular risk (PIONEER 6 population)
entities.context: Male or female, age ≥50 with established CV disease or ≥60 with CV risk factor, diagnosed with type 2 diabetes; n=3183

attributes.key_inclusion: Type 2 diabetes; age ≥50 with CV disease or ≥60 with CV risk factor
attributes.key_exclusion: Prior GLP-1 RA or DPP-4i use, NYHA Class IV HF, severe renal impairment (eGFR <30)
